allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/coins/markets?vs_currency=usd&ids=bitcoin,ethereum,solana&sparkline=true&price_change_percentage=24h&per_page=3&page=1")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{c['id']}: \\${c['current_price']:,.2f}  {c['price_change_percentage_24h']:+.2f}%  sparkline_pts={len\(c.get\('sparkline_in_7d',{}\).get\('price',[]\)\)}\\"\) for c in d]")
Bash(curl -s "https://api.bybit.com/v5/market/tickers?category=spot")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tickers=d['result']['list']; sol=[t for t in tickers if t['symbol']=='SOLUSDT']; print\('Bybit SOL:', sol[0]['lastPrice'] if sol else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
Bash(curl -s "https://www.okx.com/api/v5/market/tickers?instType=SPOT")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tickers=d['data']; sol=[t for t in tickers if t['instId']=='SOL-USDT']; print\('OKX SOL:', sol[0]['last'] if sol else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
Bash(curl -s "https://api.coincap.io/v2/assets?limit=50")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sol=[a for a in d['data'] if a['symbol']=='SOL']; print\('CoinCap SOL:', sol[0]['priceUsd'][:8] if sol else 'NOT FOUND'\)")
Bash(curl -s "https://api.kucoin.com/api/v1/market/allTickers")
